This context is related to objection handling:
ADITYA BIRLA CAPITAL
Objection Handling Scripts
1. I am so rich. I don’t need an insurance.Response: Okay. Sir, the reality is, you are what we call the ‘Titanic’. The unsinkable ship. There is no reason for you to sink. But unfortunately, if you did sink, would you like to have a life boat? You see, I am not here to teach you how to make money or, how to make another titanic. But I am very good at making life boats. And I know for a fact that, the bigger the ship, the more life boats you need.
2. How do I know that the insurance company will pay my claims?Response: Well, you see, if you drive a car, you have the air bag in the car? When was the last time you tested it? [Pause] Mr. Client, would you like to drive a car without an air bag? Probably not. And that exactly my product does. Our product is the air bag; the security measure for you.
3. I have a diversified portfolio, properties. I have a business, I have investments. Why do I need insurance? Response: Mr. Client, everyone has a plan A in life.

This context is related to objection handling:
 I have a business, I have investments. Why do I need insurance? Response: Mr. Client, everyone has a plan A in life. You invest money in businesses, you buy properties, that’s Plan A. My job is to Be Plan B. IF Plan A fails, what is your Plan B?
4. “I don’t have money”? Response: Sir/Madam, I understand how you feel, and a lot of customers felt the same way at the first instance. However, after bit of thought, they found that the entire situation was not that uncomfortable as it looked, and it actually was a sensible decision. If today we are finding it difficult to save money for your future needs like child education, retirement or death under unforeseen circumstances. How ready we would be to face that near or distant future which will require financial support. We have different products to suit need of the different individuals and I would want to provide you those products after understanding your needs. So, can we proceed?
5. “I don’t need insurance now”? Response: Sir/Madam, I understand how you feel, and a lot of customers felt the same way at the first instance.

This context is related to objection handling:
 Response: Sir/Madam, I understand how you feel, and a lot of customers felt the same way at the first instance. However, they found that adequate need of insurance is absolutely important for the overall financial security of their family. I’m glad to know that you are already insured. You are one among the few people who understand the importance of life insurance. In our company we use a scientific method of arriving at the exact amount of insurance required by you. We can review our existing insurance, compare it with your current responsibilities and lifestyle, and tell you if all your needs are being covered. For example: You must have insurance cover of at least 20 times of your income.
6. “Why should not I directly invest in equity market”? Response: Sir/Madam, I understand how you feel, and a lot of customers felt the same way at the first instance. However, after looking at the technical aspects of investments, they found that it is convenient and rewarding to invest money with us. Most customers cannot do portfolio analysis i.

 However, after looking at the technical aspects of investments, they found that it is convenient and rewarding to invest money with us. As an individual you may not have the access to research and understand the market dynamics, also you have to regularly keep a watch and spend lot of time to understand the market and invest regularly.

However, after looking at the benefits that the plan brings with it, they agreed to this plan. You would agree that an individual takes a Term Plan so that the family members get handsome claim

8. I am already updated about investment products. Everything is available on websiteResponse: Sir, it’s good to know that you are well updated about investment products available in the market. Sir, but here I would like to tell you that there are multiple plan options available for clients like you. I am being trained by my company for investment and insurance planning, many of my clients have already benefitted and are benefitting from my service/advice. Sir to provide you with the same benefit, shall I proceed ahead?
9. I don’t have any time. Response: I apologize if I bothered you Sir/Ma’am. May I know what would be a good time to call you/talk to you? It’s really important as we are taking a new initiative to connect with our existing customers and resolve their queries and offer them the services.

This context is related to objection handling:
 It’s really important as we are taking a new initiative to connect with our existing customers and resolve their queries and offer them the services. Sir, I promise that I will not sell you anything during this call, and if you do not find any value for you in my discussion, we will definitely not take it ahead. So, considering this should I proceed ahead?
10. I have not got any service from your organization. Response: I highly apologize for not getting any proper services from the company. We value our customer that’s why now I have assigned as a Relationship Executive/Manager for your policy. So, to offer better services I will be in regular contact with you and will regularly update you about your premium due dates, benefits and facilities in the policy. Keeping the same in mind, should I should I proceed ahead?
11. I have loans on me; I cannot afford to buy Life Insurance. Response 1: Sir/Ma'am, loans create financial insecurity. Having insurance becomes more important when you have any loan against you as insurance acts as a surety to pay your loans in your absence.

This context is related to objection handling:
 Having insurance becomes more important when you have any loan against you as insurance acts as a surety to pay your loans in your absence. Term plans are cost-effective tools, where you get higher cover at lower prices. In fact, insurance is an all-in-one tool, protecting you in the form of life cover, accidental cover and savings too. The thought of caring for the family is foremost in the minds of each breadwinner and an insurance policy with its life coverage takes care of financial commitments in an effective way. Response 2: Sir/Ma'am, insurance is a forced saving mechanism. No amount of loans can provide a solution for your post retirement requirements. With insurance, you can plan a targeted amount in future and the question of loan will not arise. Even by contributing as low as Rs. 30 per day, you can plan your future. After all, don’t we save that little extra to buy a car? Then why don’t we go that extra mile for insuring our lives. Also, your loan raising ability reduces with age. In future, you will have to be more dependent on the pool of fund that you have created.

This context is related to objection handling:
 Also, your loan raising ability reduces with age. In future, you will have to be more dependent on the pool of fund that you have created.
12. I already have Life Insurance with XYZ company. Response 1: Sir/Ma'am, I’m not saying you should change, and it may not make sense for you to change – that’s why I need to do some work for you to see if I can help you. One should continue to assess their changing needs and match them up with a newer vehicle that would get them more appropriate coverage. And that’s what I’m here to do for you today. Let’s do this: I’ll look at what you’ve currently got in terms of coverage and premium & I’ll compare it to what your needs are today. I’ll then review what is available to you and if there’s a better fit for you I’ll let you know about it. If not, then I’ll let you know that as well. In the end you get to decide what’s best for you. Is that fair? Response 2: Sir/Ma'am, I’m glad to know that you’re already insured. You’re one among the few people who understand the importance of life insurance.

 Response 2: Sir/Ma'am, I’m glad to know that you’re already insured. You’re one among the few people who understand the importance of life insurance. We can review your existing insurance, compare it with your current responsibilities and lifestyle, and tell you if all your needs are

13. “No. I am busy right now.” Response: Two approaches to counter this objection - I apologize if I bothered you Sir/Madam. May I know what would be a good time to call you? It’s important as we are taking a new initiative to connect with our esteemed customers and resolve their queries and offer them the services to make them aware of their investments with us.

 It’s important as we are taking a new initiative to connect with our esteemed customers and resolve their queries and offer them the services to make them aware of their investments with us. It won’t take much of your time.
14. “My relative is an agent with another company.”Response: I appreciate the fact that someone is advising you on financial matters. Every company has products with unique benefits to meet specific customer needs. I would therefore, request you to give me some time to use our company’s scientific process to analyse your current financial plans vis-à-vis your long-term needs. Basis this we will also be able to evaluate your current saving pattern. Let me assure Sir/Madam this exercise will only help you and you are under no obligation to buy and are free to decide if the suggested solution meets your needs. Should I proceed further?
15. “Thanks but I am not interested.”? Response: Sir/Madam, I hope you are not considering life insurance as an expense. When you invest in life insurance you are merely accumulating funds for yourself. Life insurance is an investment option where you are making arrangement for your own future and peace of mind.

This context is related to objection handling:
 Life insurance is an investment option where you are making arrangement for your own future and peace of mind. The option that I am recommending today will help you to arrange money for future. Thus, I would request you to at least discuss various options available which may be of any relevance to you.
16. Life insurance companies are all the same. They do not care about a customer once the sale is done. All they are always bothered about is having new customers. The existing customers don’t matter.Response: Mr./Ms. Customer, it is truly sad to hear that your conclusion about all life insurance companies is the same. However, just as 2 individuals don’t have all similar characteristics, in the same manner, not all life insurance companies are same. ABSLI is a renowned life insurance company that belongs to the prestigious Aditya Birla Group, which believes in placing the customer first. If you allow me, I would like to understand what is it that has led you to this conclusion and hopefully at the end of our conversation, I may also be able to provide a solution that would help you.

This context is related to objection handling:
 If you allow me, I would like to understand what is it that has led you to this conclusion and hopefully at the end of our conversation, I may also be able to provide a solution that would help you.Is that okay with you?
17. I would like to surrender my ABSLI policy as I am need of funds? Response: Mr./Ms. Customer, I can understand how you feel. We are all going through a difficult time However, please let me remind you that you had purchased this policy to create a corpus for your child’s education/child’s marriage/ retirement (talk as appropriate). Mr./Ms. Customer, this goal is time-based and non-negotiable, which means you will need a huge corpus in future, to fund this. Life insurance is not an investment that you surrender in difficult times. In fact, it is an investment that helps you tide through uncertainties. Keeping this in mind, let me help you explore how is it that you can continue this policy (and yet fund your current emergency through partial withdrawal).
18. I don’t believe in life insurance to fund my goals as the returns are often low and the policy continues for quite a long term.

This context is related to objection handling:
 I don’t believe in life insurance to fund my goals as the returns are often low and the policy continues for quite a long term. Response: Mr./Ms. Customer, I can understand how you feel. Infact, I would be surprised if you said you believed in life insurance. Out of every 100 customers that buy a life insurance policy, 84% enjoy maturity benefit while 16 % families receive death benefits. This 16% seems a small number, but what is really concerning is

19. We feel we should look for other alternative investments. I think I can also save in Fixed Deposit or chose invest in equity? Response: Definitely, you should. I can help you in evaluating different investment avenues for you. Please tell me which other investments are you thinking of? Fixed Deposit is designed for short term goal and the earned interest is not tax free as well.And, as you know that stock market is very volatile in nature and returns are ever fluctuating, also capital tax is levied. I would recommend you invest in guaranteed return plan. My suggested solution gives guaranteed as well as tax free corpus, which ensures guaranteed fulfillment of planned financial goals.
20. I will prefer Mutual Funds instead of ULIP because your charges are high? Response: ULIP is the only product that takes care of your investment as well as provides protection to you. It provides dual benefit, whereas Mutual Fund gives only an Investment option.

This context is related to objection handling:
 Response: ULIP is the only product that takes care of your investment as well as provides protection to you. It provides dual benefit, whereas Mutual Fund gives only an Investment option. ULIP also offers Tax Benefit. If you compare this with other product in the market, you will realize that we collect most of the charges from you upfront in the initial years and in the later years, the charges become negligible. So in the long term, ULIP expenses are less than mutual fund’s expenses.
21. In case of any emergency can I withdraw this policy and take a lumsum amount? Response: This is a long term income product where ABSLI is committing to give a guaranteed yearly income to the customer against limited years of premium payment term. In case of any emergency customer will have an option to opt for a loan against this policy. Customer can take loan amount upto 80% of the surrender value.
22. What will happen to the policy if customer is unable to pay premium after few years payment? Response: In case of non-payment of premium, the policyholder will have two options:
1) Customer can revive the policy within a revival period of five years from the due date of first unpaid

This context is related to objection handling:
 Response: In case of non-payment of premium, the policyholder will have two options:
1) Customer can revive the policy within a revival period of five years from the due date of first unpaid premium, subject to following conditions: Paying all outstanding premiums together with interest and/or late fees as declared by us from time to time; Providing evidence of Life Insured’s insurability satisfactory to us Revival of the Policy shall take effect only after revival of the Policy is approved by Us basis the Board approved underwriting policy and communicated to you in writing.
2) If customer has does not wish to revive the policy during the revival period, the policy will be lapsed and no benefits are paid. However, a reduced paid up policy shall continue till the end of policy term.
23. How can I trust that the company will pay the said amount for such long duration of 30/40 years? Response: ABSLI Nischit Aayush Plan is an IRDA registered non-linked non-participating life insurance plan. All the benefits are guaranteed in nature and you will receive a policy bond which has all the details in writing.

This context is related to objection handling:
 All the benefits are guaranteed in nature and you will receive a policy bond which has all the details in writing.
24. Can I change the income benefit option from monthly to annual or annual to monthly mode in the future? Response: Yes, you will have the flexibility to change the income benefit option in the future. You can receive the income benefits in annual, semi-annual, quarterly or monthly mode, these options can be changed at policy anniversary.

25. The maturity benefits offered in this plan are on lower side, is there any way to get a higher maturity benefits in this plan. Response: You can choose level income with enhance lumsum benefit to get higher maturity benefit. Also, if you choose 10 & 12 PPTs you will receive higher maturity benefit.
26. So, Mr. Financial Advisor/Banker, you are saying that I will be receiving 41.35% or whatever annualized returns consistently for the next 40 years.

This context is related to objection handling:
 Financial Advisor/Banker, you are saying that I will be receiving 41.35% or whatever annualized returns consistently for the next 40 years. However, if you take into account the fact that I am also investing the same annual premium regularly, how can you claim that I am achieving annualized returns of 43%? In terms of my overall investment, my absolute returns will be different? Response: Yes, Mr. Customer, I understand the point you are trying to highlight. However, we must consider that the absolute returns until the next 25, 30, 35, or 40 years, whichever year's option you have chosen, provide you with income from the first year or second year onwards regularly until the end of the policy term. Additionally, you also receive a lump sum on maturity. Therefore, if you deduct the yearly income from the annualized premium you have paid and add the continuous income you have received until the end of the policy term, along with the lump sum you received on maturity, you will find that the returns I have committed to you, sir, are the highest returns compared to any other instrument in the market.

27. "Mr. Financial Advisor/Banker, how can you assure me that I will receive a consistent and guaranteed income?" Response: "Mr. Customer, I understand your concern, and I'd like to inform you that Aditya Birla Sunlife Insurance offers the 'Nischit Ayush plan,' which is a non-linked, non-participating investment solution. This plan provides guaranteed returns until the end of the policy term, along with a lump sum on maturity. Furthermore, based on the premium paying term (during which you need to pay all your premiums) and the policy term you choose, we will provide written assurance that you will receive all your guaranteed payouts, as well as the lump sum maturity benefits."

32. Why not park my money in FD? Why to go for this? Response: Dear customer, Fixed deposits,no doubt, are a good tool if you wish to invest but please understand, With the plan that we are offering , you will not only book good or equivalent returns as FD but also this investment will align more with both of your long term and short term goals. Instant liquidity provided by the plan helps you carter your immediate needs and at the same time the lumpsum recieved in the end can be used for whatsoever purpose required. Also, in case of FD's the maximum tenure opted can be 10 years. Post that, even if you decide to renew the same, there will always be a re-investment risk involved with it. But with NAP, you can guarantee your income for as long as 40 years. Also, with FD's there will never be a life insurance cover but here we cover you for any uncertainity making it a
